identity.name: Bullfrog Bagels
identity.notes: Confirmed official Bullfrog Bagels H Street location; no merge with Union Station, Tenleytown, Western Market, or other current locations.

menuSurfaces.outcome: Current everyday Bullfrog menu; API-backed products consolidated with HTML presentations.
Current H Street weekend brunch, Saturday-Sunday 10am-2pm, served alongside regular menu; duplicate presentations consolidated.
Sole current publishing surface: structured official Wix/API catalog; page-tab presentation membership is not asserted separately.

menuSurfaces.locationScope: H Street and linked ordering destinations
menuSurfaces.outcome: Ordering navigation/vendor support; no additional in-scope H Street product boundary published.
Location/navigation support only; no cross-location merge.
Alcohol/bar content excluded from POC food and nonalcoholic boundary.

proposedChanges: Consolidate duplicate everyday/brunch/API presentations under the 40 frozen currentProductKeys.
Preserve direct official API allergen positives and mark all undisclosed allergens unavailable.
Keep support/navigation, alcohol, modifier, and duplicate-only surfaces non-publishing.
